sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_data (id INT PRIMARY KEY, xml_col XML, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT curdatetime(), value DECIMAL(10, 2));
INSERT INTO test_data (id, xml_col, created_at, value) VALUES (1, 'Sample Data', curdatetime(), 123.45);
INSERT INTO test_data (id, xml_col, created_at, value) VALUES (2, 'Another Sample', curdatetime(), NULL);
SELECT id, xpath_string('/root/a', xml_col) AS parsed_data, curdate() AS current_date FROM test_data WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, xpath_string('/root/a', xml_col) AS parsed_data, curtime() AS current_time FROM test_data WHERE created_at <= curdatetime();
SELECT id, value, curdatetime() - created_at AS age FROM test_data HAVING age > '00:30:00';
SELECT id, COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY xpath_string('/root/a', xml_col)) AS count_per_data FROM test_data WHERE xpath_string('/root/a', xml_col) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, CASE WHEN value IS NULL THEN 'No Value' ELSE xpath_string('/root/a', xml_col) END AS result FROM test_data ORDER BY created_at DESC;
SELECT AVG(value) AS avg_value, curdate() - created_at AS date_diff FROM test_data GROUP BY date_diff HAVING avg_value < 50;
SELECT id, xpath_string('/root/b', xml_col) AS invalid_data FROM test_data WHERE xpath_string('/root/b', xml_col) IS NULL;
